---
description: Finalizes and archives the active completed task bundle
---
# Finish Task

When the user asks you to finish or archive the task, wrap up the workflow state using the CLI.

1. Run the terminal command: \`pnpm workflow finalize\`.
2. If it fails because the task brief is not marked complete, fix the status field in the task brief and try again.
3. Confirm the successful archive to the user.
